hooks.command: KEY=$(echo "$PWD" | shasum -a 1 | cut -c1-12); START=$(cat /tmp/cc-start-$KEY 2>/dev/null || echo 0); START=${START:-0}; DUR=$(( $(date +%s) - START )); [ "$DUR" -lt 10 ] && exit 0; "$HOME/bin/claude_notify.sh" -title "Claude Code" -subtitle "$(basename "$PWD")" -message "任务完成" -sound Glass >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
